entry.title: Entry #226 in X Corp. v. Apple Inc., 4:25-cv-00914
entry.summary: ORDER: Before the Court are the Motions to Seal. ECF Nos. 205, 212, 219, 220 . The Court hereby ORDERS that the Motions are GRANTED. (Clerk to enter the sealed and/or ex parte document as of the date of this order.) (Ordered by Judge Mark Pittman on 4/27/2026) (saw) (Entered: 04/27/2026)

entry.title: Entry #225 in X Corp. v. Apple Inc., 4:25-cv-00914
entry.summary: ORDER: Before the Court is Defendant Apple Inc.'s Motion for Protective Order. ECF No. 221 . The Court believes that expedited briefing on the Motion is warranted. Accordingly, the Court hereby ORDERS a response to the Motion on or before Thursday, April 30, 2026, and a reply to the Motion on or before Monday, May 4, 2026. (Ordered by Judge Mark Pittman on 4/27/2026) (saw) (Entered: 04/27/2026)

entry.title: Entry #224 in X Corp. v. Apple Inc., 4:25-cv-00914
entry.summary: ORDER: Before the Court are the Unopposed Motions to Seal. ECF Nos. 212, 214 . The Court hereby ORDERS that the Motions be REFERRED to Judge Ray. (Ordered by Judge Mark Pittman on 4/24/2026) (bdb) (Entered: 04/24/2026)
